title: Post-LRH Proof Governance Registry — Consolidated Gap Closure & Release Boundary Pack
scope_description: LRH-PR-18 absorbs the original PR-18+ backlog into one consolidated post-ladder proof governance pack. Closes deterministic local proof gaps where safe. Retains external/non-local/non-goal gaps explicitly. Introduces central registries for claim phrases, claim boundaries, forbidden controls, runtime coverage, redaction, release boundaries, and Windows target-host boundaries.

original_backlog_items.note: No service, tray, or installer created. No target-host execution. Receipt contract only.
